message:
fix(core): replace truncating epoch_ms casts in completion_token, search_explain, tailer

Continue systematic replacement of `d.as_millis() as i64` with safe
`i64::try_from(d.as_millis()).ok().unwrap_or(0)` in production code
paths: completion_token::now_ms(), search_explain::build_explain_context(),
and tailer::process_delta().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
